Bash(python -c "
import subprocess
for pid in ['39352','38936','28004','60948','52804','55048','63200','66452','63372','65816']:
    r = subprocess.run\(['wmic', 'process', 'where', f'ProcessId={pid}', 'get', 'CommandLine'], 
                      capture_output=True, text=True, shell=True\)
    lines = [l.strip\(\) for l in r.stdout.splitlines\(\) if l.strip\(\) and 'CommandLine' not in l]
    if lines:
        print\(f'PID {pid}:', lines[0][:100]\)
")

")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:7888/api/jobs" | python -c "
import sys, json
jobs = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Total jobs: {len\(jobs\)}'\)
for j in jobs:
    themes = json.loads\(j['themes']\) if isinstance\(j['themes'], str\) else j['themes']
    print\(f\\"  job_id={j['job_id']} market={j['market']} themes={themes} status={j['status']} created={j['created_at']}\\"\)
")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:7888/api/jobs/38410ac8" | python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f\\"Job: {data['job_id']} | {data['status']} | {data['created_at']} -> {data['finished_at']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Themes JSON: {data['themes']}\\"\)
print\(\)
for t in data.get\('theme_tasks', []\):
    print\(f\\"  Theme: {t['theme']} | {t['status']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"    expanded_keywords: {t['expanded_keywords']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"    match_count={t['match_count']} valid_count={t['valid_count']} invalid_count={t['invalid_count']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"    final_queries \(first 5\): {t['final_queries'][:5] if t['final_queries'] else []}\\"\)
")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:7888/api/jobs/38410ac8/themes/38410ac8-t0" | python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
batches = data.get\('batches', []\)
print\(f'Validation batches: {len\(batches\)}'\)
for b in batches:
    results = b.get\('results', {}\)
    valid = sum\(1 for r in results.values\(\) if r.get\('is_valid'\)\)
    invalid = len\(results\) - valid
    print\(f\\"  batch_id={b['batch_id']} index={b['batch_index']} queries={len\(b['queries']\)} valid={valid} invalid={invalid} status={b['status']}\\"\)
")
